messages.content: I need a slogan for a business that helps others create businesses from start to finish
"Empowering Dreams, Crafting Success"

MAke this sound more professional for a website home page  Have you ever thought, “What should I do with my life?” Or “What is my purpose?” 
Sometimes, you come to a crossroads in life. It might come in the form of a quarter-life crisis or existential questioning. It might even show up on the heels of a big career change or commitment. It might even present itself when you’ve already decided to start over in life.
Thinking about a career change? Or thinking your life is good but it can be better? Or you feel stuck doing the same thing every day living in auto pilot and you want change in your life. 
A life coach can help you with this and much more. 
 
I can help you grow by analyzing your current situation, identifying your limiting beliefs and other obstacles you face and devising a custom plan of action to help you achieve the outcome you want. 
I will teach you to get absolute clarity on your top goals.
Isolate and reframe your limited beliefs that have held you back.
Device a plan of action to achieve your specific outcome.
A life coach is more than just a cheerleader. A coach can serve as your guide, a trail marker to finding your purpose. 
We Help people find their purpose, meaning, and passions in life.
"Unlocking Your Potential, Building Your Path to Success"

Fix the grammer Have you ever thought, “What should I do with my life?” Or “What is my purpose?” Sometimes, you come to a crossroads in life. It might come in the form of a quarter-life crisis or existential questioning. It might even show up on the heels of a big career change or commitment. It might even present itself when you’ve already decided to start over in life. Thinking about a career change? Or thinking your life is good but it can be better? Or you feel stuck doing the same thing every day living in auto pilot and you want change in your life. A life coach can help you with this and much more.  I can help you grow by analyzing your current situation, identifying your limiting beliefs and other obstacles you face and devising a custom plan of action to help you achieve the outcome you want. I will teach you to get absolute clarity on your top goals.
Isolate and reframe your limited beliefs that have held you back. Device a plan of action to achieve your specific outcome. A life coach is more than just a cheerleader. A coach can serve as your guide, a trail marker to finding your purpose. We Help people find their purpose, meaning, and passions in life.

"Unlock Your Life's Potential: Discover Your Purpose, Ignite Your Passion, and Achieve Limitless Success

Have you ever pondered on the questions, 'What should I do with my life?' or 'What is my true purpose?' At times, you encounter crossroads that manifest as a quarter-life crisis, existential questioning, or even the aftermath of a significant career change or commitment. Whether you are contemplating a career transition, seeking a more fulfilling existence, or feeling trapped in a monotonous routine, yearning for change, a life coach can offer invaluable assistance.

Through thorough analysis of your present circumstances, identification of limiting beliefs and obstacles, and the creation of a tailor-made action plan, I can guide you towards achieving the desired outcome. Gain absolute clarity on your primary objectives, reshape and overcome self-imposed limitations, and devise a strategic course of action. My role as a life coach transcends that of a mere cheerleader - I stand as your steadfast guide, illuminating your path to self-discovery and purpose.

Embark on a transformative journey with our help, as we empower individuals to unearth their true purpose, meaning, and passions in life."

Fix this Hi, my name is Glenny, I am a certified life coach. a mother of two wonderful boys. Born and raised in Brooklyn raised by Dominican parents, I grew up in the projects of sunset park, until I move to new jersey 1999.  I am a property manager at extra space storage for 15 years , A few years ago, while going through a trying time in my life, I decided to look at my life and ask myself why I had the same job, the same friends, the same situations for 15 years, with no excitement in my life towards the future, with no idea what was missing. I was functioning to day-to-day life, but I just knew I was not happy.  I was living on auto pilot and that’s when I decided to hire a life coach and I learned how to create my own happiness, through learning to love myself, and at the same time finding my purpose.  I absolutely loved what I was learning, and that is when I decided to go back to school to become a Certified Coach myself. When you approach yourself with love, curiosity, and compassion you will be able see significant changes in the outcome of your life. As buddha said all that we are, is a result of what we have THOUGHT. Remember that my goal is to help you achieve mind and body balance and to show you what is possible in your life.

Hello, I'm Glenny, a certified life coach and a proud mother of two wonderful boys. Growing up in Brooklyn under the care of Dominican parents, I spent my early years in the projects of Sunset Park. In 1999, I made the move to New Jersey. For the past 15 years, I have worked as a property manager at Extra Space Storage.

A few years ago, I found myself going through a challenging phase in my life. It prompted me to evaluate why I had remained in the same job, surrounded by the same people, and facing similar situations for such a long time. I was lacking excitement and direction for the future, with a nagging feeling that something vital was missing. Life had become a monotonous routine, and I knew deep down that I wasn't truly happy. This realization compelled me to seek the guidance of a life coach, and it was through this experience that I discovered how to create my own happiness. I learned the importance of self-love and uncovered my purpose.

The more I delved into this transformative journey, the more I fell in love with the process. This newfound passion inspired me to enroll in school and become a certified coach myself. I discovered that by approaching oneself with love, curiosity, and compassion, profound changes can occur, shaping the outcome of life itself. As Buddha wisely said, "All that we are is a result of what we have thought."

My ultimate goal as a life coach is to help you achieve harmony between mind and body and demonstrate the endless possibilities that exist within your life. Together, we will embark on a path that leads to balance, fulfillment, and the realization of your true potential.

Fix this This is a popular question we get asked A lot of Coaches and therapists both provide guidance. But they are not the same. Therapists help their clients work through and resolve past issues and traumas. Like (ptsd, bipolar, clinical depression and other mental health problems) Coaches work with clients on current obstacles and challenges. Coaches do not analyze, diagnose, o prescribe treatment. Coaches are for functioning individuals that are looking to change their life. A coach’s main job is to help clients take results-oriented action to move from being stuck in their lives to being empowered and liberated.

We often receive this commonly asked question: What is the difference between coaches and therapists? While both offer valuable guidance, it's important to understand their distinct roles. Therapists primarily focus on helping clients address and resolve past issues and traumas, such as PTSD, bipolar disorder, clinical depression, and other mental health concerns. On the other hand, coaches primarily support clients in overcoming current obstacles and challenges. Unlike therapists, coaches do not provide analysis, diagnosis, or prescribe treatment. Coaches are best suited for individuals who are already functioning well but are seeking to make positive changes in their lives. The main objective of a coach is to assist clients in taking targeted actions that lead them from feeling stuck to feeling empowered and liberated.

Fix this When choosing a life Coach, here are seven benefits to keep in mind: 

1.	Better self-confidence. A study by the IFC reported that 80% of people who hired a life coach reported improved self-confidence. 
2.	A growth mindset. A benefit to coaching is a shift in perspective. At Glenny’s, we think of this as a growth mindset. With coaching, you can expand and nurture your growth mindset. 
3.	Improved self-awareness. Research found that only 10-15% of people studied were self-aware, despite people believing that they are self-aware. But with coaching, you have a guide to reflect on your progress and your levels of self-awareness. Coaching can help you build your self-awareness muscle and ultimately, gain more confidence in knowing who you are.
4.	Improved relationships and communication skills. According to the Institute of Coaching, your relationships will benefit from coaching. One study found that of those who participated in coaching, over 70% benefitted from improved work performance, relationships, and effective communication skills.
5.	Our data has shown that folks who take part in coaching report a higher sense of purpose and meaning.
6.	Improved overall well-being. Coaching can also help improve your overall well-being. Our data also shows that most people who start coaching in a “stuck” period get better. In fact, 77% will significantly improve their well-being state in three to four months with personalized support.
7.	Lower stress levels (and better resiliency). The same data cited above shows that a benefit of coaching is lowered stress levels and better resiliency.

When selecting a life coach, it's crucial to consider the following seven benefits:

1. Enhanced self-confidence: A study by the IFC revealed that 80% of individuals who hired a life coach experienced improved self-confidence.

2. Cultivation of a growth mindset: Coaching facilitates a shift in perspective, fostering a growth mindset. At Glenny's, we prioritize nurturing and expanding this mindset.

3. Heightened self-awareness: Studies indicate that only 10-15% of individuals truly possess self-awareness, despite many believing they do. With the guidance of a coach, you can reflect on your progress, develop self-awareness, and gain the confidence of truly understanding who you are.

4. Improved relationships and communication skills: The Institute of Coaching highlights that coaching has a positive impact on relationships. Research indicates that over 70% of individuals who engaged in coaching observed improved work performance, enhanced relationships, and effective communication skills.

5. Enhanced sense of purpose and meaning: Our data demonstrates that individuals who undergo coaching report an increased sense of purpose and meaning in their lives.

6. Overall well-being improvement: Coaching plays a vital role in enhancing overall well-being. Our data reveals that individuals who start coaching during a "stuck" phase experience significant improvement in their well-being within three to four months when provided with personalized support.

7. Reduced stress levels and improved resiliency: The aforementioned data also highlights the benefits of coaching in reducing stress levels and bolstering resiliency.

By considering these seven benefits, you can make an informed decision when choosing a life coach who can help you unlock your full potential and live a fulfilling life.

Fix this        Customized coaching sessions created just for you. We will work together to create a custom plan that fits your unique needs.

•	I will teach you how to self-coach yourself with tools that you will have for a lifetime. There will never be a problem that you won't know how to solve.
•	Discover life-changing program that will transform you from the inside out.
•	You will have access to reach me in between our weekly scheduled sessions either by text or email, if something comes up for you and you need to talk.

•	We will communicate by text in between our scheduled I will send you weekly affirmations and I will answer any questions that you may have.

•	Fun assignments to complete.

Experience tailored coaching sessions meticulously crafted to suit your individual needs. Together, we will develop a personalized plan that caters specifically to you.

Here's what you can expect from our coaching partnership:

• Empowerment through self-coaching: I will equip you with essential tools and techniques that empower you to become your own lifelong coach. With these invaluable skills, there won't be a challenge you won't know how to overcome.

• Life-changing transformation: Explore a transformative program designed to reshape your life from within. This journey will unlock your true potential and lead to profound personal growth.

• Continual support: Enjoy the convenience of reaching out to me beyond our scheduled sessions. Whether through text or email, I am readily available to address any pressing matters that may arise and provide the guidance you need.

• Ongoing communication and guidance: Stay connected with me through text exchanges between our scheduled sessions. Receive weekly affirmations to uplift and inspire you, and feel free to ask any questions you may have. I am here to support your progress every step of the way.

• Engaging assignments: Prepare for enjoyable and enriching assignments that complement your coaching journey, allowing you to actively apply new insights and accelerate your growth.

Together, we will embark on an empowering and transformative coaching experience, personalized to reflect your unique aspirations and objectives. Let's create positive change from within and unlock the limitless possibilities that lie ahead.

I would like a price list for a life coach to include private 12 week session one hour a week for a total of $3000 or a $500 discount if paid in advance. Payment plans are as follows $250 per session or $1000 A month

Life Coaching Services Pricing:

Private 12-Week Session:
- Total Investment: $3,000
- Benefits: One hour of personalized coaching per week for a duration of 12 weeks.
- Special Discount: Receive a $500 discount if payment is made in advance.

Payment Plan Options:
1. Per Session Payment:
   - Price per Session: $250
   - Flexibility: Pay for each session individually.

2. Monthly Payment:
   - Total Monthly Investment: $1,000
   - Benefits: Spread the payment over four months, with monthly installments of $1,000.

Please note that the pricing mentioned above is subject to change and may vary based on specific client needs and additional services offered. For a detailed discussion on your requirements and a customized pricing package, please contact me directly. I am committed to tailoring our coaching services to meet your unique goals and budget.
I need a list of services a personal life coach provides in a 12 week time span

In a 12-week engagement with a personal life coach, you can expect to receive a variety of services and support to help you achieve your goals and create positive change in your life. Here is a list of common services provided by a personal life coach during this timeframe:

1. Goal Setting: Work together with your life coach to identify and establish clear, meaningful goals that align with your aspirations and values.

2. Personalized Action Plan: Create a customized roadmap and action plan tailored to your specific objectives, incorporating strategies and steps to help you progress towards your goals.

3. Weekly Coaching Sessions: Engage in one-on-one coaching sessions with your life coach, typically lasting one hour each week. These sessions provide a supportive and confidential space for reflection, exploration, and guidance.

4. Accountability and Progress Tracking: Your coach will help you stay accountable to your commitments and track your progress towards your desired outcomes. Regular check-ins and assessments will help you stay on track and make adjustments as needed.

5. Personal Development: Explore and enhance personal skills, such as self-awareness, self-confidence, communication, resilience, and decision-making, to foster personal growth and achieve a greater sense of fulfillment.

6. Overcoming Obstacles: Address and overcome challenges that may arise during the coaching process. Your coach will help you develop strategies to navigate obstacles and maintain momentum towards your goals.

7. Mindset and Belief Work: Challenge and reframe limiting beliefs and negative thought patterns that may be holding you back. Your coach will support you in developing a positive and empowering mindset.

8. Tools and Techniques: Learn practical tools, techniques, and strategies to support your personal development, improve decision-making, manage stress, enhance time management, and optimize productivity.

9. Resources and Recommendations: Receive relevant resources, including recommended readings, articles, exercises, and activities, to deepen your self-awareness, broaden perspectives, and further your growth.

10. Ongoing Support: Benefit from ongoing support, guidance, and encouragement from your life coach in-between sessions. This may include email or text support, answering questions, providing feedback, and offering additional resources.
